_meta.title: Windows File Explorer Ribbon Toolbar — Reference Specification
_meta.purpose: Reference for XjRibbon control styles, button types, and dropdown items

Button.description: Standard action button. Fires a single command on click. No state retained.

ToggleButton.description: On/off button that retains pressed/unpressed state. Used for show/hide toggles (e.g. Preview pane). Visually distinct from CheckBox — no checkbox glyph.

CheckBox.description: Boolean control with a visible checkbox glyph (checked/unchecked). Used for persistent settings that feel like 'always on/off' (e.g. File name extensions, Hidden items). Semantically identical to ToggleButton but visually renders as a labeled checkbox row.

SplitButton.description: Composite control with TWO hit areas: (1) primary button fires the main command directly; (2) dropdown arrow opens a menu of related options. Example: Navigation pane — click icon to toggle pane, click arrow to change pane options.
SplitButton.key_distinction: Primary area is clickable independently from the dropdown arrow

DropDownButton.description: Entire button (icon + label + arrow) opens a dropdown menu. No separate primary action — all clicks open the menu. Example: Sort by, Group by, Options.
DropDownButton.key_distinction: Any click opens the menu; there is no standalone primary action

InRibbonGallery.description: A scrollable collection embedded directly in the ribbon band. Shown with up/down scroll arrows on the right edge. Items are mutually exclusive (radio-style) or command-based. Can have an expand arrow to show all items in a popup. Example: Layout view modes (Icons, Details, List...).
InRibbonGallery.scroll_behavior: Vertical or horizontal scrolling within ribbon band itself

DropDownGallery.description: A button that opens a full gallery in a dropdown panel (popup). Richer than DropDownButton — gallery items have images and can be laid out in a grid. Not seen in these screenshots but part of the framework.

SplitButtonGallery.description: Like SplitButton but the dropdown section opens a gallery panel instead of a plain menu. The primary button shows the currently selected gallery item.

Group.description: Container that organises related controls under a text label shown at the bottom. Separated from adjacent groups by vertical dividers. Can collapse to a popup icon when space is constrained.

Tab.description: Top-level navigation element. Clicking activates it and reveals its groups. The selected tab is visually highlighted (blue underline in these screenshots).

Large.layout: Large icon on top, text label below (up to 2 lines). Button spans full group height (~48-52px). Most prominent — used for primary group actions.

Medium.layout: Small icon on left, text label to the right on a single line. Two or three fit vertically in a group column. Standard workhorse size.

Small.layout: Small icon on left, compact label to the right (or label omitted). Typically three stack vertically in a group column. Used for secondary commands.

application_button.label: File
application_button.note: Opens backstage/application menu. Not captured in provided images.

controls.label: Pin to Quick access
controls.tooltip: Pin selected folder to Quick access in the navigation pane
controls.action: Pins or unpins the selected folder from the Quick access section

controls.label: Copy
controls.tooltip: Copy the selected items to the clipboard
controls.action: Copies selected item(s) to the clipboard

controls.label: Paste
controls.tooltip: Paste items from the clipboard into the current folder
controls.action: Pastes clipboard item(s) into current folder

controls.label: Cut
controls.tooltip: Cut the selected items (moved on paste)
controls.action: Cuts selected item(s) to clipboard; item moves on next Paste

controls.label: Copy path
controls.icon_description: Copy with file path / address bar icon
controls.tooltip: Copy the path of the selected item to the clipboard
controls.action: Copies the full file system path (e.g. C:\Users\...) to clipboard as text

controls.label: Paste shortcut
controls.icon_description: Paste icon with shortcut arrow overlay
controls.tooltip: Create a shortcut to the clipboard item in the current folder
controls.action: Creates a .lnk shortcut file pointing to the clipboard item
controls.enabled_when: Clipboard contains a file or folder

controls.label: Move to
controls.tooltip: Move the selected items to another folder
controls.primary_action: Opens Browse For Folder dialog to choose destination

controls.label: Copy to
controls.tooltip: Copy the selected items to another folder
controls.primary_action: Opens Browse For Folder dialog to choose destination

controls.label: Delete
controls.tooltip: Delete the selected items
controls.primary_action: Moves selected item(s) to the Recycle Bin

dropdown_items.label: Recycle
dropdown_items.action: Move to Recycle Bin — can be restored

dropdown_items.label: Permanently delete
dropdown_items.action: Delete immediately, bypassing Recycle Bin — cannot be undone

controls.label: Rename
controls.tooltip: Rename the selected item
controls.action: Puts the selected item's filename into inline edit mode

controls.label: New folder
controls.icon_description: Yellow folder with star / new folder icon
controls.tooltip: Create a new, empty folder
controls.action: Creates a new folder in the current location with an editable name

controls.label: New item
controls.icon_description: Blank document with plus / star icon
controls.tooltip: Create a new file
controls.action: Opens a menu of new file types to create

controls.label: Properties
controls.tooltip: View the properties of the selected item
controls.primary_action: Opens the Properties dialog (General, Security, Details tabs)

dropdown_items.label: Remove properties
dropdown_items.action: Opens dialog to strip metadata/properties from the file

controls.label: Open
controls.tooltip: Open the selected item
controls.primary_action: Opens selected item with its default application

dropdown_items.label: Open
dropdown_items.action: Open with the default associated app

dropdown_items.label: Open with
dropdown_items.action: Choose which application to open the file with

controls.label: Edit
controls.tooltip: Edit the selected file
controls.action: Opens the selected file in its default editing application (e.g. Paint for images, Notepad for .txt)

controls.label: History
controls.tooltip: View previous versions of this file from File History backup
controls.action: Opens File History to browse and restore previous versions of the selected file

controls.label: Select all
controls.tooltip: Select all items in the folder
controls.action: Selects every visible item in the current folder view

controls.label: Select none
controls.tooltip: Deselect all items
controls.action: Removes selection from all currently selected items

controls.label: Invert selection
controls.tooltip: Invert the current selection
controls.action: Selects all unselected items and deselects all currently selected items

controls.label: Share
controls.tooltip: Share the selected items with other people or devices
controls.action: Opens the Windows sharing picker dialog for selected file(s)

controls.label: Email
controls.tooltip: Send the selected items as email attachments
controls.action: Opens default mail client with selected file(s) as attachments

controls.label: Zip
controls.tooltip: Compress and share the selected items
controls.action: Creates a compressed (.zip) folder from selected file(s)

controls.label: Burn to disc
controls.tooltip: Burn selected files to optical disc using Windows Disc Image Burner
controls.action: Burns selected file(s) to CD/DVD

controls.label: Print
controls.tooltip: Send the selected items to a printer
controls.action: Opens the Print dialog for selected file(s)

controls.label: Fax
controls.tooltip: Send the selected items as a fax
controls.action: Opens Windows Fax and Scan with selected file(s)

controls.layout_note: Vertical scrollable list on the right side of the 'Share with' group. Shows up/down scroll arrows on the far right edge.

items_visible_in_image.label: Create or join a homegroup
items_visible_in_image.action: Opens the HomeGroup setup and joining wizard

items_visible_in_image.label: Barticus
items_visible_in_image.action: Share selected file(s) with this specific network user
items_visible_in_image.note: Represents a discovered network user. Label = user/computer name. This is a runtime-populated item.

items_visible_in_image.label: Specific people...
items_visible_in_image.action: Opens File Sharing dialog to manually choose sharing targets

inferred_additional_items.label: Nobody
inferred_additional_items.icon_description: Single person with X or lock icon
inferred_additional_items.action: Stops sharing — makes file/folder private (not shared with anyone)

inferred_additional_items.label: Homegroup (view)
inferred_additional_items.action: Share with all homegroup members in read-only mode

inferred_additional_items.label: Homegroup (view and edit)
inferred_additional_items.action: Share with all homegroup members with read+write permissions

groups.layout_note: Appears after 'Share with' group, separated by a vertical divider. No visible group label in screenshot.

controls.label: Stop sharing
controls.tooltip: Stop sharing the selected item
controls.action: Removes all sharing permissions from the selected file/folder

controls.label: Advanced security
controls.tooltip: View or edit detailed security permissions
controls.action: Opens advanced security and permissions management

dropdown_items.label: Properties...
dropdown_items.action: Opens the Security tab of the file's Properties dialog

dropdown_items.label: Edit permissions...
dropdown_items.action: Opens dialog to add/remove/modify NTFS permissions for users and groups

dropdown_items.label: Effective access...
dropdown_items.action: Shows the calculated effective permissions for a given user or group

tabs.label: View
tabs.capture_note: Correctly shows the View tab with 'Details' layout selected (highlighted blue).

controls.label: Navigation pane
controls.icon_description: Panel layout with left sidebar highlighted
controls.tooltip: Show or hide the Navigation pane
controls.primary_action: Toggle visibility of the navigation pane (tree view on left)

dropdown_items.label: Navigation pane
dropdown_items.action: Show or hide the navigation pane

dropdown_items.label: Expand to open folder
dropdown_items.action: Auto-expand the folder tree to reveal the currently open folder

dropdown_items.label: Show all folders
dropdown_items.action: Show all shell folders in the navigation pane (including Control Panel, Recycle Bin, etc.)

dropdown_items.label: Show libraries
dropdown_items.action: Show the Libraries section in the navigation pane

controls.label: Preview pane
controls.icon_description: Panel layout with right preview area highlighted
controls.tooltip: Show or hide the preview pane (displays file content on the right)
controls.action: Toggle the preview pane on the right side of Explorer window

controls.label: Details pane
controls.icon_description: Panel layout with bottom details strip highlighted
controls.tooltip: Show or hide the details pane (shows file metadata at bottom)
controls.action: Toggle the details pane at the bottom of Explorer window

controls.layout_note: 2-column grid embedded in ribbon band. Scroll arrows on right. Items are radio-style — selecting one deselects all others.

items.label: Details
items.visual_note: Highlighted blue in the screenshot — this is the active layout

inferred_additional_items_below_scroll.label: Tiles
inferred_additional_items_below_scroll.icon_description: Medium tile grid with text to the right of each icon

inferred_additional_items_below_scroll.label: Content
inferred_additional_items_below_scroll.icon_description: List with icon and multiple lines of metadata

controls.label: Sort by
controls.tooltip: Change the sort order of items in the current folder
controls.action: Opens menu to select sort column and direction

controls.label: Group by
controls.tooltip: Arrange items in groups based on a property
controls.action: Opens menu to select grouping column and direction

controls.label: Add columns
controls.tooltip: Add or remove columns in Details view
controls.action: Opens menu to toggle visible columns in Details view
controls.note: Only meaningful when Layout is set to Details

dropdown_items.label: More...
dropdown_items.action: Opens 'Choose Details' dialog with full list of available columns

controls.label: Size all columns to fit
controls.tooltip: Automatically resize all columns to fit their content
controls.action: Resizes all columns in Details view to best-fit their content width
controls.note: Only meaningful when Layout is set to Details

controls.label: Item check boxes
controls.icon_description: File icon with a checkbox overlay
controls.tooltip: Show checkboxes on items so you can select multiple items easily
controls.action: Toggles selection checkboxes on file and folder icons

controls.label: File name extensions
controls.tooltip: Show or hide file name extensions for known file types
controls.action: Toggles display of extensions (e.g. .txt, .docx) in file names
controls.note: Extensions hidden in screenshot — typical default Windows setting

controls.label: Hidden items
controls.icon_description: File icon with eye / visibility symbol
controls.tooltip: Show or hide files and folders marked as hidden
controls.action: Toggles visibility of files/folders with the Hidden attribute set
controls.note: Checked (enabled) in screenshot — hidden items are visible

controls.label: Hide selected items
controls.tooltip: Mark the selected items as hidden
controls.action: Sets the Hidden file attribute on selected file(s) or folder(s)

controls.label: Options
controls.tooltip: Change options for files, folders, and search
controls.action: Opens folder and search options

dropdown_items.label: Change folder and search options
dropdown_items.action: Opens the Folder Options dialog (View, General, Search tabs)

control_priority: Button (Large + Medium + Small) — most common, implement first
CheckBox — simple toggle, implement early for Show/hide group
ToggleButton — similar to CheckBox but without glyph (Preview pane, Details pane)
DropDownButton — needed for Sort by, Group by, Add columns, Options
SplitButton — needed for Navigation pane (split primary + dropdown)
InRibbonGallery — needed for Layout view selector and Share with targets list

visual_anatomy.group_label: Small text label centred below the group's controls
visual_anatomy.tab_indicator: Blue underline/highlight on the active tab label
visual_anatomy.selected_gallery_item: Blue highlight background on the currently selected InRibbonGallery item
visual_anatomy.checked_checkbox: Filled checkbox glyph (✓) next to label
visual_anatomy.split_button_divider: Thin vertical line separating primary area from dropdown arrow area

key_interactions.SplitButton_primary: Click on icon/label area → fires main command directly
key_interactions.SplitButton_dropdown: Click on arrow area → opens dropdown menu
key_interactions.InRibbonGallery_item: Click item → selects it (radio) or fires command
key_interactions.InRibbonGallery_scroll: Click up/down arrows → scroll through items
key_interactions.CheckBox_click: Toggles between checked and unchecked state
key_interactions.ToggleButton_click: Toggles between pressed and unpressed state
